title: HINMAY Stainless Steel Serving Tongs - 9 Inch, 3 Pieces with Scalloped Gripping Edge
features: 【DURABLE METERIAL, EASY ON YOUR HAND】HINMAY stainless steel food tongs are made from a thick, corrosion resistant stainless steel for unbeatable strength and premium construction, while remaining light weight and easy to handle!
【MULTI-PURPOSE USAGES】These 9" tongs are sturdy and strong, with a sure, firm grip - perfect for cooking, grilling and serving many types of food
【FUNCTIONAL DESIGN】The sliding locking ring makes it easy to carry and storage at any place. Clam Shell head makes it easy to grip and release.
【PACKAGE CONTENT】3 × 9 Inch stainless steel serving tongs (silver)

【CUSTOMER SATISFACTION IS OUR #1 PRIORITY】When you purchase this specialty clam shell small serving Food Tongs 9-Inch Tool, you're offered a 100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION SERVICE. Just contact us through your order if you have any questions and we will serve you until you get your 100% satisfaction. Try it risk free!!
description: Product Description HINMAY (9-Inch 3 Pieces) Stainless Steel Serving Tongs Kitchen Cooking Tongs with Scalloped Gripping Edge Metal Tongs Stainless Steel Heads Clam Shell head makes it easy to grip and release Stainless Steel Sliding Rings Stainless Steel Sliding Rings (New Upgraded) makes it easy to carry and storage at any place Stainless Steel Body Premium quality stainless steel construction with corrosion resistant body New Design Easy to use NOTICE 1. Please wash the 9-inch tongs with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process; 2. Please clean and air dry the small tongs after using for your healthy daily use, and store them in dry place for its durability; 3. You can use it in various ways, Great versatility that can be used for all your cooking, grilling or barbeque (BBQ) needs!
